zh.lifeSummary: 當Philip De Chetwynd於1295年出生時，他的父親Philip De Chetwynd30歲，母親Isabella Puleston16歲。他於大約1305年與Alice Grendon結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他去世於1346年在法國哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯可雷希享年51歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Philip De Chetwynd于1295年出生时，他的父亲Philip De Chetwynd30岁，母亲Isabella Puleston16岁。他于大约1305年与Alice Grendon结婚。他们至少是5个儿子的父母。他去世于1346年在法国哈帕格-亞登阿爾登斯可雷希享年51岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Chetwynd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Chatwin
meanings: English (Warwickshire and Staffordshire): habitational name from a place in Shropshire called Chetwynd, from the Old English personal name Ceatta + Old English (ge)wind ‘winding ascent’.

nameMeanings.name: Philip
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek name Philippos, meaning ‘lover of horses’, from philein ‘to love’ + hippos ‘horse’. This was popular in the classical period and since. It was the name of the father of Alexander the Great . It was also the name of one of Christ's apostles, of a deacon ordained by the apostles after the death of Christ, and of several other early saints. See also Philippa .

en.lifeSummary: When Philip De Chetwynd was born in 1295, his father, Philip De Chetwynd, was 30 and his mother, Isabella Puleston, was 16. He married Alice Grendon about 1305. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He died in 1346, in Crécy, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Philip De Chetwynd est né en 1295, son père, Philip De Chetwynd, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Isabella Puleston, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Alice Grendon environ 1305. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il est décédé en 1346, à Crécy, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, France, à l’âge de 51 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Philip De Chetwynd 1295 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Philip De Chetwynd 30 und seine Mutter Isabella Puleston 16. Er hat um 1305 Alice Grendon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb 1346 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Crécy, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Philip De Chetwynd è nato il nel 1295, il suo padre, Philip De Chetwynd, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Isabella Puleston, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Alice Grendon circa 1305. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì nel 1346, nel Crécy, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, all'età di 51 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Philip De Chetwyndが1295年に生まれた時，父Philip De Chetwyndは30歳，母Isabella Pulestonは16歳であった。約1305年にAlice Grendonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼は1346年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアルデンスクルeシで51歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Philip De Chetwynd(이)가 1295년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Philip De Chetwynd(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabella Puleston(은)는 16세였다. 그는 대략 1305년 Alice Grendon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1346년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 아데네스 크e시에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Philip De Chetwynd nasceu em 1295, seu pai, Philip De Chetwynd, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Isabella Puleston, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Grendon aproximadamente 1305. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1346, em Crécy, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, França, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Philip De Chetwynd родился в 1295 г., его отцу по имени Philip De Chetwynd было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabella Puleston, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Grendon около 1305 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Он умер в 1346 г. в местности крeси, арденнесь, чампагне-арденн, Франция в возрасте 51 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Philip De Chetwynd nació en 1295, su papá, Philip De Chetwynd, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Isabella Puleston, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Alice Grendon aproximadamente 1305. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos. Murió en 1346, en Crécy, Ardennes, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, a la edad de 51 años.
